Game.Name: Gojira - Kaijuu Daikessen (Japan)
Game.plot: Godzilla: Kaijuu Daikessen is an Action game, developed by Alfa System and published by Toho,which was released in Japan in 1994.Cheat: Vs mode optionsIn the character selection screen hold L,R, Select and press start to exit vs mode. Holding select and choosing a character allows the computer to use them during the round. Pressing B will cancel the selection.Cheat: Spaceship cameoHave Godzilla defeat Mothra with 30 seconds left to see a spaceship from a movie fly by in the back.
